name: Baton Routing Patterns
description: Pre-baked routing patterns. Convenience functions that construct RoutingConfig for common use cases including A/B testing, canary deployments, header-based routing, and weighted splits.

types.name: RoutingConfig
types.description: External type from baton.schemas representing routing configuration

types.name: RoutingTarget
types.description: External type from baton.schemas representing a routing target with name, host, port, and optional weight

types.name: RoutingRule
types.description: External type from baton.schemas representing a routing rule with header, value, and target

types.name: RoutingStrategy
types.description: External enum from baton.schemas with routing strategy types

functions.name: ab_split
functions.description: Two-target weighted split (A/B test). Creates a RoutingConfig with two targets (a and b) where traffic is split according to pct_a percentage.

inputs.name: host
inputs.description: Hostname for both A and B targets

inputs.name: pct_a
inputs.description: Percentage of traffic to route to target A (target B gets 100 - pct_a)

postconditions: Both targets use the same host

functions.name: canary
functions.description: Canary rollout: small percentage to new version. Creates a RoutingConfig with a stable target and a canary target for gradual rollout.

inputs.name: host
inputs.description: Hostname for both stable and canary targets

inputs.name: canary_pct
inputs.description: Percentage of traffic to route to canary (stable gets 100 - canary_pct)

postconditions: Both targets use the same host

functions.name: header_route
functions.description: Header-based routing. Creates a RoutingConfig that routes requests based on HTTP header values using specified rules.

inputs.name: targets
inputs.description: List of (name, host, port) tuples defining available routing targets

inputs.name: header
inputs.description: Header name to match on for routing decisions

inputs.name: rules
inputs.description: List of (header_value, target_name) tuples defining routing rules

inputs.name: default
inputs.description: Name of the default target when no rules match

postconditions: Returns targets matching the input targets list
Returns rules with specified header name and value-target mappings
Sets default_target to the specified default value
Number of targets equals length of targets input
Number of rules equals length of rules input

functions.name: weighted_split
functions.description: N-target weighted split. Creates a RoutingConfig with multiple targets where traffic is distributed according to specified weights.

inputs.name: targets
inputs.description: List of (name, host, port, weight) tuples defining targets and their weights

postconditions: Returns targets matching the input targets list with corresponding weights
Number of targets equals length of targets input
Each target has name, host, port, and weight from corresponding input tuple

invariants: All functions are pure and idempotent - same inputs always produce same outputs
No validation is performed on input values (ports, percentages, target names)
Percentage calculations assume integer arithmetic (100 - pct)
All functions construct and return new RoutingConfig instances
